title: felicia zeyheri
intro: Felicia zeyheri, also known as the Blue Felicia or Blue Daisy Bush, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Felicia zeyheri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and protect against infections, making it a valuable asset in natural remedies. Herbal preparations of Felicia zeyheri can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
